rule: v0 rs12913832 (binary calls only), stratified by SELF-REPORTED ancestry
interpretation: within-European accuracy ~= full-cohort accuracy -> rs12913832 predicts eye colour by MECHANISM, not merely by tagging European ancestry (the confound does not drive the result).
caveats: self-reported ancestry via keyword proxy (not genetic ancestry inference)
OpenSNP is Euro-dominated -> NON_EUROPEAN stratum is small (expected; that IS the point)
v0 binary calls only (homozygotes); heterozygotes abstained as in v0
